bio: Meeku moved to our area from Cluster D where she was known as 'Silverbush Mamma'. She is extremely scared and so very hard to get close to. She disappeared for months in mid-2022 where we think she may have been trapped in an AC unit and survived on insects and very little as she had lost SO MUCH weight. We fed her twice daily until we were worried as she had put on so much weight and had a paunch! Unfortunately, she is having some serious issues with her teeth right now, so we are desperately trying to trap her to take her to the vets. She isn’t eating. She is very difficult to catch and is extremely clever.
location: She hides under cars in Cluster P carpark down from Carrefour
